creator: conrads@cox.net
text:
Update shells/ch to version 7.0.

		I've been in communication recently with an individual 
		from softintegration.com, and suggested they release an 
		updated version of this package to be compatible with 
		FreeBSD 9.0 (the old version was for 5.1).  The new 
		version was just made available today.

		I've removed the dependencies on compat4x, as this 
		version no longer requires those versions of any 
		libraries.

		I will be happy to reassume maintainership of the port 
		as well (I was the original submitter).

Fix: patch below
How-To-Repeat: 		N/A
